raw_consumer_statement: Citibank Costco VISA is overcharging me for the amounts of {$140.00} and {$310.00}. These are Citibank charges, not a merchant. Citibank applied these as " Reverse '' charges, but never had issued a temporary credit for these amounts. The {$140.00} charge was on my XXXX XXXX statement, and the {$310.00} charge was on my XXXX statement. I had a dispute case open, but Citibank stated it was resolved without removing these charges. They provided a letter with the statement of resolution that contained an audit report that clearly shows this is still an issue. In addition, their customer service is terrible. I have made nearly a dozen phone calls to their customer service number. Each time I must spend approximately 20 minutes explaining the situation. I have discovered these are agents that can only send a message to the billing center, they can not resolve anything. Their supervisors have no authority either. I have sent several letters and emails directly to the billing center and have never received a direct reply. I only received a letter that says the dispute is resolved, allowing me no opportunity to interact, explain, or question the process or results.
